title: erysimum semperflorens
intro: Erysimum semperflorens, also known as Wallflower or Western wallflower, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its bright yellow flowers and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erysimum semperflorens include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Erysimum semperflorens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
